title: PepeLand Loading Screen
description: Loading screen like PepeLand site style
body:
## Экран загрузки в стиле сайта сервера [PepeLand](https://pepeland.net/)!
**Для полноценной работы рекомендуется мод [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)**

![Load](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5T2YHXrP/images/065a1461c21c0b4daa9f3fbd0c614fe2c75a92a8.png)

<details>
<summary>En</summary>

## [PepeLand](https://pepeland.net/) server style loading screen!
**The [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) mod is recommended for full functionality**.

![Load](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5T2YHXrP/images/065a1461c21c0b4daa9f3fbd0c614fe2c75a92a8.png)
